children.name: Showcasing my UI/UX design projects alongside selected graphic and video works, this portfolio highlights my ability to create engaging digital experiences and versatile visual designs.

children.name: This is another set of designs that showcases a few graphic design pieces created for different clients, including posters and branding assets. Each design highlights my ability to adapt to different styles and deliver clean, visually appealing results.

children.name: NARDO’s BURGER: Your Burger in One Tap
children.characters: NARDO’s BURGER: Your Burger in One Tap

children.name: This project is a Burger E-Commerce Mobile Application designed as part of a school project during my 2nd year in college. The app focuses on providing an intuitive interface for ordering and managing burger products online. As the UI/UX Designer, I created the design concept and user flow to ensure a visually appealing and seamless shopping experience.
children.characters: This project is a Burger E-Commerce Mobile Application designed as part of a school project during my 2nd year in college. The app focuses on providing an intuitive interface for ordering and managing burger products online. As the UI/UX Designer, I created the design concept and user flow to ensure a visually appealing and seamless shopping experience.

children.name: The Learning Management System (LMS) was our capstone project during my 3rd to 4th year in college, developed for our school as the main beneficiary. It streamlines course management, progress tracking, and communication between instructors and students. As the Head UI/UX Designer, I led the design to ensure a seamless and user-friendly experience.
children.characters: The Learning Management System (LMS) was our capstone project during my 3rd to 4th year in college, developed for our school as the main beneficiary. It streamlines course management, progress tracking, and communication between instructors and students. As the Head UI/UX Designer, I led the design to ensure a seamless and user-friendly experience.

children.name: This project involves the Web Registration Page for Hytec Power Inc., developed during my On-the-Job Training. As the UI/UX Designer, I focused on designing a clean and user-friendly registration interface that ensures a smooth onboarding experience for new users of the company’s system.
children.characters: This project involves the Web Registration Page for Hytec Power Inc., developed during my On-the-Job Training. As the UI/UX Designer, I focused on designing a clean and user-friendly registration interface that ensures a smooth onboarding experience for new users of the company’s system.

children.name: This project is the HPI Connect Account Registration Page, designed during my On-the-Job Training at Hytec Power Inc. As the UI/UX Designer, I created an intuitive and visually cohesive registration page that simplifies the account creation process and enhances user experience.
children.characters: This project is the HPI Connect Account Registration Page, designed during my On-the-Job Training at Hytec Power Inc. As the UI/UX Designer, I created an intuitive and visually cohesive registration page that simplifies the account creation process and enhances user experience.

children.name: This project is a Website and Mobile UI Design created as a part-time project for a client whose end client was Sumisho. As the UI/UX Designer, I designed the complete user interface flow — from account creation to all key pages — ensuring a seamless and consistent experience across both web and mobile views.
children.characters: This project is a Website and Mobile UI Design created as a part-time project for a client whose end client was Sumisho. As the UI/UX Designer, I designed the complete user interface flow — from account creation to all key pages — ensuring a seamless and consistent experience across both web and mobile views.

children.name: This character video introduction was created as part of our 2024 capstone project. I handled the video editing, bringing together character clips, transitions, and visual effects to create a dynamic and engaging introduction sequence. The goal was to set the tone for the project, highlight each character’s role, and present a professional and cohesive opening for our final output.
children.characters: This character video introduction was created as part of our 2024 capstone project. I handled the video editing, bringing together character clips, transitions, and visual effects to create a dynamic and engaging introduction sequence. The goal was to set the tone for the project, highlight each character’s role, and present a professional and cohesive opening for our final output.

children.name: This project is a Mobile Coin Game Application, created as a part-time project. As the UI/UX Designer, I designed the coin reward claiming page and the modal interface, focusing on clarity, accessibility, and a visually engaging user experience.
children.characters: This project is a Mobile Coin Game Application, created as a part-time project. As the UI/UX Designer, I designed the coin reward claiming page and the modal interface, focusing on clarity, accessibility, and a visually engaging user experience.

children.name: This project is the FlyMingle Application, where I served as the UI/UX Designer. I designed the complete user flow — from onboarding to account creation — for five different user types, creating interactive and visually engaging interfaces that enhance usability and user experience.
children.characters: This project is the FlyMingle Application, where I served as the UI/UX Designer. children.name: This project is Navigent, where I worked as the UI/UX Designer. I redesigned the entire interface, starting from the landing page, and created new interactive pages for both web and mobile versions to improve visual consistency and user engagement.
children.characters: This project is Navigent, where I worked as the UI/UX Designer. I redesigned the entire interface, starting from the landing page, and created new interactive pages for both web and mobile versions to improve visual consistency and user engagement.

children.name: This project is the Spinlit Web Game, where I served as the UI/UX Designer. I designed the game interface and card visuals for the game page, which I created using Adobe Photoshop to achieve a cohesive and engaging visual style.
children.characters: This project is the Spinlit Web Game, where I served as the UI/UX Designer. I designed the game interface and card visuals for the game page, which I created using Adobe Photoshop to achieve a cohesive and engaging visual style.

children.name: This project is TaskPilot, where I worked as the UI/UX Designer. I redesigned the website from the landing page through the full user flow and created new pages to enhance functionality, visual consistency, and overall user experience.
children.characters: This project is TaskPilot, where I worked as the UI/UX Designer. I redesigned the website from the landing page through the full user flow and created new pages to enhance functionality, visual consistency, and overall user experience.

children.name: This project focused on designing a clean and user-friendly UI/UX for FoodLight AI, an AI-powered platform for mobile and web. I created a minimal visual style and interactive prototypes to showcase core features and user flows, ensuring an intuitive and engaging user experience.
children.characters: This project focused on designing a clean and user-friendly UI/UX for FoodLight AI, an AI-powered platform for mobile and web. I created a minimal visual style and interactive prototypes to showcase core features and user flows, ensuring an intuitive and engaging user experience.

children.name: This project involved creating a professional and visually compelling pitch deck for BaMo (“Bahay Mo”). I designed the presentation to clearly communicate the brand’s vision, value proposition, and business potential, helping my client present effectively to her stakeholders and secure a successful deal.
